handoffBanner: Hand-to-Hand Exchange: Coordinate payments and handoffs safely via chat. Meet in public spaces!

slide1Desc: The ultimate marketplace built specifically for the Georgian cosplay and gaming community.
slide2Desc: Trade costumes, wigs, and custom props completely free with 0% transaction fees. Meet safely in local hubs!
slide3Desc: Build your artisan profile, earn trust medals, and turn your craftsmanship into total local earnings.
termsNotice: By creating an account you agree to our Terms of Service.

browseWhileUnverified: You can browse and buy right now — verification unlocks selling.

pricingBothOptions: You can offer both options at once.
toggleSaleRent: Toggle For Sale and/or For Rent.
titleMin: Title must be at least 5 characters
descriptionMin: Add a bit more detail for buyers
usernameHint: This is your public handle visible to other users.
bioPlaceholder: Tell the community about your cosplay style…
makeAChange: Make a change above to enable saving
changesSavedDesc: Your changes have been saved successfully.
chatStartHint: Ask about availability, size, or shipping.
chatWarn_transfer: ⚠️ Heads-up — Kosmeo is a cash-only, hand-to-hand marketplace. Never transfer money via bank, card, or any app. Pay in person only, after inspecting the item.
chatWarn_shipping: ⚠️ Kosmeo doesn't support shipping or couriers. All exchanges happen face-to-face at a public meetup hub. If someone asks you to ship, that's a red flag.
chatWarn_offplatform: ⚠️ Keep all negotiations here in Kosmeo chat. Moving to another app removes your transaction record and your ability to report issues. Stay safe, stay here.
chatWarn_deposit: ⚠️ Never pay a deposit before meeting in person. Legitimate sellers on Kosmeo don't ask for advance payments. This is a common scam pattern — proceed with caution.
report_sheet_subtitle: What's going on? Select the reason that best describes the issue.
report_detail_placeholder: Describe what happened in your own words (optional but helpful)…
report_privacy_note: Your identity is kept confidential. Kosmeo reviews all reports within 48 hours.
report_done_desc: Thank you for helping keep Kosmeo safe. Our team will review this within 48 hours. The reported user will not know who filed this report.
defect_resolution_subtitle: Discover a problem after your meetup?
defect_step1_desc: Take clear photos and a short video of the defect right now, while you still have the item. Timestamp matters.
defect_step2_title: Contact the seller in Kosmeo chat
defect_step2_desc: Open the original conversation and send your photos. State the defect clearly and propose a resolution — a partial refund or return meetup.
defect_step3_title: Give the seller 48 hours to respond
defect_step3_desc: Most sellers resolve issues quickly to protect their rating. If they agree, arrange a follow-up meetup at the same public hub.
defect_step4_desc: After 48 hours with no reply, use the Report button in the chat header to flag the seller. Include your defect photos in the detail field.
defect_step5_desc: Our team will review your report, contact the seller, and — if the defect was hidden deliberately — apply a warning or suspend the account.
defect_step6_desc: After any outcome, leave an accurate review. Your rating protects the community from the same issue in future transactions.
